name: Client / Sales Meeting
description: Capture client goals, deliverables, and next steps.

sections.title: Client Goals & Success Criteria
sections.instruction: Everything the client said about what they want to achieve and how success will be measured. Capture all details given — do not condense.

sections.title: Agreed Deliverables
sections.instruction: Every deliverable discussed or agreed upon, with any timelines or specifications mentioned.

sections.title: Commercial Terms Discussed
sections.instruction: Every pricing, SLA, payment term, or contract item discussed. Capture all specifics mentioned.

sections.title: Risks & Concerns
sections.instruction: Every concern, risk, blocker, or escalation item raised — by either party. Describe each fully.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: Every next step and action item identified. Describe each action clearly and specifically, including any deadlines mentioned. Do NOT assign owners — focus on what needs to be done.
